© Internet Alchemy, Inc. 4
I’m going to show you a scenario.
This is NOT an income claim!
Scenario
• You build a webinar funnel that consistently earns you
$30 per webinar registrant on cold traffic
• Cold traffic = traffic that comes from ads, people who
don’t already know you (so they’re “cold” – not yet
warmed up to know and trust you)
Paid Ads
• You create ad campaign(s) that generates registrations
for your webinar for $15 each
• Remember, you’re making $30 per registrant
• So you’re making $15 for each person who registers
($30 - $15 = $15 profit)
• Not bad, right?

11
12

© Internet Alchemy, Inc. 5
Continuing This Scenario
• You run your ads and get 100 people to register
• You earn $1500 ($15 per registrant X 100 registrants =
$1500)
• $1500 for an hour and a half webinar
• That’s $1000 per hour!
• (Again, not bad!)
But Don, what about all the time I
spent in creating and marketing that
webinar?
Yep, you should definitely count
that in
The first time you run the
webinar
